hotels.name: Homestay Dalimo 2 Syariah Payakumbuh RedPartner
hotels.description_fr:
Disposant d’hébergements avec une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, la climatisation et une télévision à écran plat, l’établissement Homestay Dalimo 2 Syariah Payakumbuh RedPartner se trouve à respectivement 34 km et 34 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Hatta Palace et Jam Gadang.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport international Minangkabau) est à 101 km.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
About this property

Comfortable Accommodation: Homestay Dalimo 2 Syariah Payakumbuh RedPartner in Payakumbuh offers a 2-star aparthotel experience with free WiFi, air-conditioning, and private bathrooms. Each unit includes free toiletries and a TV for guest convenience.

Convenient Facilities: Guests can enjoy free WiFi throughout the property, ensuring connectivity during their stay. The aparthotel provides parking facilities, catering to those travelling by car.

Local Attractions: Located 101 km from Minangkabau International Airport, the aparthotel is 34 km from Hatta Palace and Gadang Clock Tower, offering easy access to local landmarks.

Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Homestay Dalimo 2 Syariah Payakumbuh RedPartner ofrece alojamiento con wifi gratis, aire acondicionado y TV de pantalla plana, y se encuentra a 34 km de Palacio Hatta y a 34 km de Torre del reloj Jam Gadang.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto internacional de Minangkabau) está a 101 km.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
Fornecendo acomodações com acesso Wi-Fi gratuito, ar condicionado e televisão de ecrã plano, Homestay Dalimo 2 Syariah Payakumbuh RedPartner localiza-se a 34 km de Palácio de Hatta e a 34 km de Torre do Relógio Gadang.

O Aeroporto Internacional de Minangkabau fica a 101 km de distância.

A distância mencionada na descrição do alojamento é calculada com o © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_it:
Homestay Dalimo 2 Syariah Payakumbuh RedPartner offre alloggi dotati di WiFi gratuito, aria condizionata e TV a schermo piatto, a 34 km da Bung Hatta Palace e 34 km da Jam Gadang.

Aeroporto Internazionale di Minangkabau si trova a 101 km di distanza.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap
